# .NET Version Upgrade Progress

## Overview

Upgrading SimpleWebApp from .NET 8.0 to .NET 10.0 LTS using the All-at-Once strategy. The application is a single ASP.NET Core MVC project with no external NuGet packages, making this a straightforward TFM bump with optional code modernization.

**Progress**: 1/1 tasks complete (100%) ![100%](https://progress-bar.xyz/100)

## Tasks

- ✅ 01-upgrade-framework: Update SimpleWebApp from net8.0 to net10.0
